case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. SHELLAM ENLOW ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 67680552) AS TO DEFENDANT ENLOW, SHELLAM

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $11.13 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ENLOW, SHELLAM DOES 1 TO 5
